No extra headings, no JSON, no markdown, no extra lines.

Thus we should output:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra whitespace. Should we include a trailing newline? Probably okay. Should we include any other fields? No. So produce exactly those three lines.

Thus final answer is exactly that.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
